title: Unbreakable Leads
description: Stop leads (leashes) from breaking. No matter your speed or distance from the leashed entity, the lead will never snap.
body:
Leads will never break again- Stops almost all instances of leads breaking!

**NOTE: Must be installed on the server in order to function! (Or your client for singleplayer)**

# Features:
- Stop leads from snapping due to being too far away from the mob
- Stop leads from snapping due to moving too fast/firework boosting (primarily elytra flight)
- Mute the lead break sound effect to avoid sound clutter
- Rather than just teleporting the mob, it is launched toward the lead holder for clearer visuals, which maintains the vanilla appearance
- Still allows for removing leads by right clicking mobs or shearing happy ghasts
